examples.title: Input/Output Statements
examples.description: A Python program that reads input from the user and displays the output.
examples.code: name = input('What is your name? ')\nprint('Hello, ' + name)
examples.explanation: This program uses the input() function to read input from the user and the print() function to display output to the user.

examples.title: File Input/Output
examples.description: A Python program that reads input from a file and displays the output.
examples.explanation: This program uses the open() function to open the file, the read() method to read the contents of the file, and the print() function to display output to the user.

examples.title: File Input/Output
examples.description: A Python program that writes output to a file.
examples.explanation: This program uses the open() function to open the file and the write() method to write output to the file.
